MonoBehaviour (fileID 628911205; guid acbdb9f0a1fd00f44bf08cc79a3c9bfb) on StartingPoint is TeleportAnchorWithFade, and this scene MonoBehaviour component is its exact configuration. It inherits TeleportationAnchor and overrides OnSelectEntered/Exited/Activated/Deactivated to run a fade sequence when teleportTrigger matches. Current scene setting shows m_TeleportTrigger = 0 (OnSelectEntered), m_TeleportAnchorTransform = 628911206, and m_InteractionManager = 1487704658. To cover TeleportAnchorWithFade, we need to simulate an XR selection entering this anchor so that FadeSequence runs (calls FadeCanvas.QuickFadeIn -> waits -> base.OnSelectEntered -> FadeCanvas.QuickFadeOut). Requires a FadeCanvas instance in scene and an XRBaseInteractor to drive SelectEntered.

To cover the OnSelectExited branch in TeleportAnchorWithFade, set m_TeleportTrigger to OnSelectExited (enum value 1) for the same MonoBehaviour (fileID 628911205) or provide another StartingPoint variant configured with value 1. Then simulate XR selection exit to invoke FadeSequence(base.OnSelectExited, args).

To cover the OnActivated branch in TeleportAnchorWithFade, set m_TeleportTrigger to OnActivated (enum value 2) on MonoBehaviour fileID 628911205 (or supply another instance with that value). Then simulate XR activation to invoke FadeSequence(base.OnActivated, args).

To cover the OnDeactivated branch in TeleportAnchorWithFade, set m_TeleportTrigger to OnDeactivated (enum value 3) on MonoBehaviour fileID 628911205 (or supply another instance with that value). Then simulate XR deactivation to invoke FadeSequence(base.OnDeactivated, args).
